file_uploader.code:
uploaded_file = st.file_uploader('Upload CSV', type=['csv'])
if uploaded_file:
    df = pd.read_csv(uploaded_file)
    st.dataframe(df)

streamlit_connection.code:
# In secrets.toml:
# [connections.mydb]
# url = "postgresql://user:pass@localhost/db"

conn = st.connection('mydb', type='sql')
data = conn.query('SELECT * FROM sales')
st.dataframe(data)
